mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activity ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity ( activity_id, activity_name, department, host_unit, manager_id, auditor_id, activity_hour, hour_type, start_time, end_time, sign_type, activity_status, create_time, activity_img, location, capacity, enroll_start_time, enroll_end_time, manager_org_id, auditor_org_id ) VALUES ( #{activityId}, #{activityName}, #{department}, #{hostUnit}, #{managerId}, #{auditorId}, #{activityHour}, #{hourType}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{signType}, #{activityStatus}, NOW(), #{activityImg}, #{location}, #{capacity}, #{enrollStartTime}, #{enrollEndTime}, #{managerOrgId}, #{auditorOrgId} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE activity
activity_name = #{activityName},
department = #{department},
host_unit = #{hostUnit},
activity_hour = #{activityHour},
hour_type = #{hourType},
location = #{location},
start_time = #{startTime},
end_time = #{endTime},
enroll_start_time = #{enrollStartTime},
enroll_end_time = #{enrollEndTime},
capacity = #{capacity},
activity_img = #{activityImg},
activity_status = #{activityStatus},
WHERE activity_id = #{activityId}
UPDATE activity SET activity_status = '活动进行中' WHERE activity_status = '待报名' AND start_time <= NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT a.* FROM activity a INNER JOIN activity_record ar ON a.activity_id = ar.activity_id WHERE ar.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY ar.enroll_time DESC
SELECT a.* FROM activity a INNER JOIN activity_record ar ON a.activity_id = ar.activity_id WHERE ar.student_id = #{studentId} AND ar.sign_status = 1 ORDER BY ar.sign_time DESC
